title: Chicken Pasta with Citrus and Pickled Veggies
description: A vibrant and zesty pasta dish featuring chicken, pickled veggies, and a squeeze of citrus.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add chicken breast and cook until browned on both sides and cooked through.
Remove chicken from skillet and set aside.
Add garlic to skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add pickled veggies to skillet and cook for 2 minutes.
Squeeze citrus juice over pickled veggies and toss to coat.
Add cooked pasta to skillet and toss to combine.
Return chicken to skillet and toss to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
